attacking_style: Not an attacker in traditional sense; excels in time trials where consistent power delivery and pacing precision are deployed from start to finish, regardless of distance.
team_tactics: Functions as time trial specialist and domestique; sets early benchmarks in prologues and ITTs that provide psychological pressure on GC contenders and team morale boosts.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling time trial courses where aerodynamics and sustained power matter most. Exposed on mountain stages where climbing-specific power-to-weight becomes critical.
vulnerability: Limited relevance outside time trial stages; lacks climbing ability to impact mountain stages where Grand Tours are typically decided.
key_patterns: Consistently posts top provisional times in ITTs, often holding lead until WorldTour TT specialists finish.
Peaks specifically for time trial stages in stage races, showing preparation timing precision.
Delivers domestique-level ITT performances that exceed pure climbers, providing team tactical advantages.
Sets early benchmarks that eliminate GC contenders, creating race selection before favorites finish.
form_trajectory: positive: Demonstrated progression from strong domestique ITT performances (2017 Tirreno) to Grand Tour stage victory (2017 Giro) to GC-impacting prologue performance (2018 Dauphine), showing sustained ITT excellence.
